title: UNOFFICIAL SMPOnline S5 Ultra Epic Optimized Edition Modpack
description: An extension of the official SMPOnline Season 5 modpack that adds more optimizations, quality of life upgrades, and optional mods.
body:
**ULTRA EPIC (and) OPTIMIZED EDITION**

a Community-Enhanced SMPOnline Season 5 Modpack.

**⚠️ Looking for the official SMPOnline Season 5 pack?  [Click here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/smponline-s5-pack)**

---

This community edition is independently maintained and not vetted by CallMeCarson or CodeHusky (Loki). Please direct any issues to me on Discord **@getcoffee**, not to any devs of SMPOnline.

---

## What's Inside

This modpack refines the official experience with comprehensive performance boosts, visual upgrades, and essential quality-of-life improvements:

- **Performance Optimizations**  
 Lithium, FerriteCore, Concurrent Chunk Management Engine, More Culling, EntityCulling, BadOptimizations, ScalableLux, and memory management improvements.

- **Visual Enhancements**  
 Iris shader support, Enhanced Block Entities, Entity Model/Texture Features, Continuity for connected textures, OptiGUI, Dynamic FPS, Model Gap Fix, Animatica for animated texture / resource packs, and NotEnoughAnimations for improved player animations.

- **World Rendering & Exploration**  
 Distant Horizons for extended view distance and mods for improved lighting systems.

- **Audio & Communication**  
 Sound Physics Remastered for realistic audio, Chat Heads for player avatars in chat, ChatAnimation, and More Chat History.

- **User Interface & Quality of Life**  
 Better Ping Display, Durability Tooltip, Pick Up Notifier, AppleSkin for hunger/saturation display, and Paginated Advancements.

- **Customization & Integration**  
 Figura for custom player models, Capes, CraftPresence for Discord, Controlify for controller support ⚠️ **(remove if using pojav / mojolauncher)** ⚠️, and Cubes Without Borders for borderless fullscreen on all desktop operating systems.

- **Creative & Building Tools**  
 Jade for advanced tooltips and Fabrishot for high-resolution screenshots.

- **Stability & Debugging**  
 Debugify for 3rd party bug fixes, Not Enough Crashes for better crash handling, and comprehensive mod configuration systems.

This pack is a living project. Mods may be added, updated, or removed to keep everything stable and compatible.
---

Please check "Versions" for the complete modlist
